articles.title: What Zombiechain? Cardano Tops Blockchains In Active Developer Counts
articles.description: Cardano has often come under fire from those in the crypto space who have often mocked the apparent ‘lack of growth’ of the network. This has been especially more prominent when it comes to the decentralized finance (DeFi) part of the blockchain, as it continues to remain well behind its counterparts in the sector.
